hero.title: Stop Guessing. Start Thriving.
hero.subtitle: Discover your ideal career path through an expert-developed, AI-enhanced assessment. Get personalized insights, actionable recommendations, and career clarity, delivered through an interactive experience.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Your career clarity journey in three simple steps
howItWorks.step1Description: Answer thoughtful questions about your experience, goals, personality and preferences. Takes about 25 minutes.
howItWorks.step2Description: Our AI analyzes your unique profile to generate personalized career recommendations and a detailed personality report.
howItWorks.step3Description: Explore your results through an interactive chat, ask questions, and get actionable next steps for your career.

whyAtlas.title: Why Cairnly
whyAtlas.subtitle: What makes Cairnly different
whyAtlas.feature1Description: Built on proven career development frameworks and personality assessment methodologies.
whyAtlas.feature2Description: Advanced AI provides deeper analysis and more personalized recommendations than traditional assessments.
whyAtlas.feature3Description: Discuss your results in real-time, ask follow-up questions, and explore careers that interest you.

pricing.title: Invest in Your Future
pricing.headline: Invest in Your Future - Beta Access
pricing.intro: Cairnly is currently available as a beta version, giving you early access at an introductory price. Your insights and feedback will help shape the future of personalized career guidance.
pricing.subtitle: Get personalized career clarity with our comprehensive assessment package
pricing.footerNote: Your journey begins here. After purchase, you'll receive immediate access to the questionnaire, get quick results, and start your interactive AI coaching session.

features.f1: Analyses adjusted to your primary goals
